message:
Add comprehensive beads from FrankenSuite high-level plan

Created ~48 new beads covering Bayesian diff selection, conformal
frame-time prediction, S3-FIFO caching, NitroSketch telemetry,
flat combining, and cross-cutting methodology framework.
Full dependency graph with zero cycles.
